items.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
items.lead_paragraph: See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.

items.lead_paragraph: Our most agentic Sonnet yet, with top-tier intelligence for coding and everyday professional work.

items.title: Building safeguards for Claude
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

items.title: Government of Alberta uses Claude to find and fix cybersecurity vulnerabilities
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: The Government of Alberta has been using Claude Code with both Opus and Sonnet models to review its systems, find vulnerabilities, and fix them.

items.title: Announcing Anthropic's Responsible Scaling Policy
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: We’re publishing our Responsible Scaling Policy—a series of technical and organizational protocols that we’re adopting to help us manage the risks of developing increasingly capable AI systems.

items.title: More details on Fable 5’s cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: What is and isn't blocked by our cyber classifiers, and a first draft of our jailbreak severity framework

items.title: Redeploying Claude Fable 5
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is redeploying Claude Fable 5 starting July 1 following the lifting of export controls, with updated cybersecurity safeguards and a new industry jailbreak framework.

items.title: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Today we’re launching Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.

items.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.
